raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A wooden cutting board with a green vegetable (pakchoi) is on a table. A knife is on the table to the right of the cutting board. The robot arm is positioned over the table. STRATEGY - First, grasp the knife to pick it up. Then, transport the knife to the cutting board. Next, grasp the pakchoi on the cutting board. Use the knife to chop the pakchoi into smaller pieces. Finally, place the chopped pieces back onto the cutting board. Failure modes include dropping the knife or pakchoi, or not properly positioning the knife for chopping. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the knife handle to grasp it. Step 2: Transport the knife to the cutting board. Step 3: Grasp the pakchoi on the cutting board. Step 4: Use the knife to chop the pakchoi. Step 5: Place the chopped pieces back on the cutting board.**
Goal: chopped(pakchoi); on(pakchoi, cutting_board)
Scene: cutting_board, pakchoi, knife, table
Step 1: grasp(knife)
  affordance_region: the handle of the knife
  contact: holding(knife) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(knife)
Step 2: transport(knife -> cutting_board)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the cutting board
  spatial: above(knife, cutting_board, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(knife)
  done_when: above(knife, cutting_board, 0.05)
Step 3: grasp(pakchoi)
  affordance_region: the body of the green pakchoi
  contact: holding(pakchoi) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pakchoi)
Step 4: chop(pakchoi)
  affordance_region: the blade of the knife
  contact: contact(knife, pakchoi) [completion]
  spatial: above(pakchoi, cutting_board, 0.05) [completion]
  direction: chop_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: chopped(pakchoi)
Step 5: place(pakchoi -> cutting_board)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the cutting board
  contact: surface_contact(pakchoi, cutting_board) [completion]; released(pakchoi) [completion]
  pose: stable(pakchoi) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pakchoi, cutting_board) AND released(pakchoi)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: an empty area on the cutting board
the body of the green pakchoi
an empty area on the cutting board
